3049830.name: OUTTA HELL
3049830.description:
OUTTA HELL throws you into the afterlife as Mono, a former bank robber now trapped in a corporate purgatory.

To escape, you’ll need firepower, cunning, and skill. Dive in guns blazing, slow down the chaos with time-bending combat, or move tactically through the shadows.

Explore haunting and ethereal dimensions filled with deadly foes, from hollow souls to military demons and corrupt CEOs. Tear down the corporations that rule the afterlife.

Hunt down secrets, collect cash, and upgrade your skills and arsenal to become faster, stronger, and deadlier.

OUTTA HELL FEATURES:

  • Thrilling, brutal combat

  • Slow Mo - Bullet Time

  • Full-body movement: slide, combat roll, and more

  • Buy and upgrade weapons and gear

  • Secrets, collectibles, and cash to discover

  • Diverse, immersive environments

  • Dark, ethereal aesthetic

  • Hideout hub world to plan your next move

  • And much more…

You are a little volcano in the nighttime

The world must burn under your fingertips

GAME IS IN ACTIVE DEVELOPMENT,

ALL CONTENT IS SUBJECT TO CHANGE AND NOT REPRESENTATIVE OF FINAL QUALITY
3049830.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
